subject: [PATCH v2 14/18] fuse: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations in the fuse filesystem to use the new ->iomap_next() callback. This change uses the iomap_process() helper, which finishes any previous mapping and produces a new one. The conversion is done for both the dax.c and file.c files, with no functional changes intended. The virtio_fs.c file also has a minor update to reflect the use of ->iomap_next().
